data.body: EPIC 2141 CLOSED + CERTIFIED after adding the code-round navigation test (test_code_round_selector_default_latest_and_older) that the epic verifier required — the impl already supported ?code_round; the test proves it. Amended story F commit -> 03518604f (Change-Id preserved). All 3 tickets (epic + A + F) CLOSED+CERTIFIED. Re-pushing amended 702 for fresh Verified, then submit stack 702->699.
